intake.object_under_review: trigger-event poller for F-R44-A..D observation windows
intake.scope: design ONLY — produce spec at state/r44_anima_roadmap_poller_design_spec_2026-04-27.md; NO implementation; READ-ONLY anima discipline preserved
intake.anima_repo_access: READ-ONLY for design exploration (file-listings, head/tail, structure inference)
intake.context_summary: ω-cycle anima-r44-falsifiers-fr44a-d-observation today: 0 PASS / 3 NOT_OBSERVED / 1 CONDITIONAL across F-R44-A..D. Each window is event-driven (anima file growth, HF license accept, GPU run completion) NOT periodic. Manual re-check is wasteful. Poller surfaces sentinel only when window opens.
non_goals: implement the poller (deferred to follow-up cycle)

falsifiers_preregistered.name: each-fr44-x-trigger-criterion-extracted-verbatim-from-prior-witnesses
falsifiers_preregistered.claim: F-R44-A..D criterion strings are quoted verbatim from parent witnesses (anima-r44-falsifiers-fr44a-d-observation falsifier_observations[*].criterion_verbatim)
falsifiers_preregistered.verification: spec §2 quotes 4 criteria verbatim with explicit 'Criterion (verbatim)' framing matching parent witness fields exactly

falsifiers_preregistered.name: observable-signal-identified-per-criterion
falsifiers_preregistered.claim: for each F-R44-X, at least one concrete file path + structure + predicate is named
falsifiers_preregistered.verification: spec §3 table provides 11 distinct (path, probe, predicate) tuples covering all 4 falsifiers, including JSON schema samples for the two key files (zombie_posterior_v3 + step3_bba_correlation/result.json)

falsifiers_preregistered.name: poller-arch-specified-with-public-interface
falsifiers_preregistered.claim: spec defines CLI surface, exit codes, sentinel format, per-check contract, state persistence, invocation cadence
falsifiers_preregistered.verification: spec §4 covers (4.1) CLI + exit codes / (4.2) per-check contract / (4.3) sentinel format / (4.4) state JSONL+JSON files / (4.5) cadence / (4.6) notification options

falsifiers_preregistered.name: anima-repo-read-only-discipline-honored-in-design
falsifiers_preregistered.claim: spec mandates zero writes to /Users/ghost/core/anima, all probes are Read/glob/grep/wc/git log; nexus-side state is the ONLY write target
falsifiers_preregistered.verification: spec §1 declares READ-ONLY explicitly; §3 paths all anima-side READ; §4.4 persistence is nexus-side only; §8 checklist requires fs-syscall audit + post-run git status in anima clean; §9 honesty findings reaffirm

falsifiers_preregistered.name: implementability-checklist-included
falsifiers_preregistered.claim: spec contains a concrete implementability checklist that a follow-up cycle can execute against
falsifiers_preregistered.verification: spec §8 provides 10-item checklist incl. file path, raw#8 compliance, selftest mock fixtures, schema-drift CHECK_ERROR path, atlas-untouched assertions, anima zero-write audit; LOC estimate 200-400 hexa

axis_1.name: trigger-extraction-honesty
axis_1.description: extract criterion verbatim, refuse to soften thresholds; map only to observables that already exist or follow established anima naming
outputs: F-R44-A criterion verbatim quoted; predicate n>=30 + posterior<=0.20 + ci<0.15 preserved exactly
F-R44-B HID_TRUNC requirement quoted verbatim; observable file pattern listed as multi-pattern (no precedent file yet — explicit caveat)
F-R44-C r>0.8 threshold + 6-bb requirement quoted verbatim; HF gate composite condition surfaced
F-R44-D 5-list quoted verbatim; coarseness acknowledged honestly as POLL_FEASIBLE_BUT_LOW_FREQUENCY (not silently treated as observable equal to A-class)

axis_2.name: design-implementability
axis_2.description: every spec element must be operationalizable: file paths must exist or follow precedent, predicates must be deterministic, contract must be testable
outputs: CLI interface mirrors existing nexus tool conventions (--check-all / --selftest / exit codes)
per-check function contract returns tuple<state, evidence> — matches existing hexa tool style
state JSONL schema matches existing nexus history-tape pattern (atlas_health_timeline.jsonl style)
schema-drift firewall (CHECK_ERROR not silent NOT_OBSERVED) prevents future false-negative bugs

fanout_axes.correlation_estimate: <0.7 — axis_1 enforces honesty about what we cannot observe; axis_2 enforces concreteness about what we can. Cases like F-R44-D require axis_1 to mark coarseness while axis_2 still designs a working observable — tension is genuine, axes are decoupled.

section_titles: 2. Per-falsifier trigger criteria (verbatim from prior witness)

per_falsifier_design_row.criterion_verbatim: H3 cross-substrate Φ convergence — 7-substrate × 4-family alignment matrix with Bayesian posterior shift > 0.5 → 0.2 + CI<0.15
H7c metric-tractable upper bound — Φ measurement protocol that excludes >50% LR_satur ceiling artifact (close C4 ceiling-axis driver)
per_falsifier_design_row.predicate: any matching file present non-empty OR roadmap line matching ^roadmap [0-9]+ done.*HID_TRUNC

per_falsifier_design_row.criterion_verbatim: H7b strong-emergence CMT — independent 6-bb verifier replication of CMT result with r>0.8 cross-backbone (currently HCMT-B PARTIALLY_CONDITIONAL)
per_falsifier_design_row.predicate: step3 n_bb >= 6 AND step3 max_abs_r >= 0.8 AND step1 status NOT IN {BLOCKED_HF_GATED, deferred}

per_falsifier_design_row.criterion_verbatim: own#2 PC empirical-max — at least 1/5 of {multi-EEG cohort N≥30 / CLM Φ live measurement / self-report calibration / adversarial probing / arxiv preprint v0.1} delivered
per_falsifier_design_row.predicate: preprint frontmatter has arxiv_id OR roadmap done-line for {self-report-calibration|adversarial-probing} OR eeg cohort_size >= 30 OR clm_phi_live_measurement true OR phase_1_*_delivered field flips
per_falsifier_design_row.honest_caveat: 5-of-5 sub-deliverables coarse; clm_phi_live_measurement field name INFERRED — first impl run must verify schema and report; CHECK_ERROR if absent (no silent NOT_OBSERVED)

exit_codes.3: CHECK_ERROR on at least one probe

poller_architecture_summary.invocation_cadence: on-demand (each ω-cycle entry) + event-driven (anima .roadmap or atlas_convergence_witness.jsonl mtime change) + daily fallback (F-R44-A/B/C) + weekly fallback (F-R44-D)
poller_architecture_summary.notification_default: stdout sentinel + JSONL append (zero external dependency)
poller_architecture_summary.notification_options_v2: telegram (only if existing alert_subscriber wired) | email (default OFF)
poller_architecture_summary.fallback_on_missing_file: NOT_OBSERVED (path_missing:true in evidence) — never silent CHECK_ERROR confusion
poller_architecture_summary.fallback_on_schema_drift: CHECK_ERROR (FAIL sentinel) — conservative loud-failure for honesty firewall

foreign_repo_discipline.audit_requirement: post-run git status in anima must be clean — added to §8 impl checklist
foreign_repo_discipline.schema_inference_one_field_caveat: F-R44-D.clm_phi_live_measurement field name inferred not verified; impl must surface CHECK_ERROR on absence

tier_1_eval.tier_1_meta: design-spec-only deliverable PASS on all 5 falsifiers

deliverables.tool_implementation: DEFERRED — explicit non-goal of this cycle, see spec §8 + §10 for follow-up checklist

raw_policy.raw_8_hexa_only: honored — only .md (spec doc) + .json (witness) emitted; zero .py/.sh/.rs/.toml; tool impl deferred so no new .hexa created either
raw_policy.raw_10_honesty: honored — F-R44-D classified POLL_FEASIBLE_BUT_LOW_FREQUENCY (not silently equated with A-class observability); F-R44-D.clm_phi field name explicitly flagged as INFERRED; F-R44-B has no precedent file so multi-pattern glob with explicit acknowledgement

carry_forward.next_cycle_priority: high — replaces wasteful manual re-check ritual; impl is small (~200-400 LOC hexa, single cycle)
carry_forward.schema_discovery_action: first impl run must verify field name for F-R44-D.clm_phi_live_measurement in /Users/ghost/core/anima/state/n6_consciousness_substrate_status.json; emit CHECK_ERROR + heads-up if absent
carry_forward.downstream_observation_re_fire_trigger: fire arp_r44_falsifiers_for_promotion observation re-run when poller emits __R44_POLLER__ PASS — i.e. event-driven not session-cadence-driven
